tools.name: Retiree Budget
tools.description: Monthly income and expenses in retirement. Guaranteed income coverage and what-if scenarios.

tools.name: Personal Budget
tools.description: Monthly pay, fixed and variable expenses, and savings goals. Savings rate and what-if scenarios.

tools.name: Allocation Calculator
tools.description: Four-bucket allocation, blended equity target, and account-level recommendations.

tools.name: Quarterly Tax Estimator
tools.description: For business owners. Actual P&L each quarter vs. safe harbor side by side.

tools.name: SS Claiming Optimizer
tools.description: Compare benefits at 62, FRA, and 70. Break-even age, lifetime totals, spousal and survivor benefits.

tools.name: Cash vs. Finance: Vehicle Calculator
tools.description: Pay cash or finance and invest the difference? Models loan terms, returns, liquidity, and cash flow impact.

tools.name: Value Calculator
tools.description: What Are You Really Paying For? Fee comparison and advisor value tool for prospects and clients.

tools.name: Rent vs. Sell Property
tools.description: Should you keep renting out a property or sell it? Models cash flow, capital gains, Section 121 exclusion, and net proceeds.

tools.name: Roth Conversion Calculator
tools.description: Should you convert? How much, what's the tax hit, and what's the long-term break-even.

tools.name: RMD Calculator
tools.description: Required minimum distribution amounts by age, account balance, and IRS life expectancy table.

tools.name: Trump Accounts vs. 529 vs. UTMA/UGMA
tools.description: Compare education and custodial savings vehicles — tax treatment, flexibility, control, and long-term outcomes.
tools.notes: Timely given new Trump account legislation

tools.name: Pay Off Mortgage vs. Save/Invest
tools.description: Extra payment toward the mortgage vs. investing the difference. After-tax return spread, payoff timeline, and net worth impact.

tools.name: Lease vs. Finance: Vehicle
tools.description: True cost comparison of leasing vs. financing. Monthly payment, total outlay, residual value, and mileage considerations.
tools.notes: Pairs well with Cash vs. Finance vehicle tool

tools.name: Home Purchase: Down Payment vs. Save/Invest
tools.description: 20% down now vs. less down and investing the difference. PMI cost, opportunity cost, and net worth trajectory over time.

tools.name: Home Refinance Calculator
tools.description: Cost-benefit analysis of refinancing. Break-even on closing costs, monthly savings, and total interest saved over remaining term.

tools.name: Business Valuation Estimator
tools.description: Estimate business value using revenue multiples, EBITDA multiples, and asset-based approaches.

tools.name: Monte Carlo / Will My Money Last?
tools.description: Probability of portfolio survival across market scenarios over a given retirement horizon.

tools.name: Net Worth Snapshot
tools.description: Assets vs. liabilities quick picture. Clean visual summary for client review meetings.

tools.name: Tax Bracket Visualizer
tools.description: See how income layers stack across brackets. Marginal vs. effective rate clarity for planning conversations.
